Comment.MultiLanguageText: HW-Id of the component from which interrupts are to be received
HW-Id of the component (module) from which an interrupt was received
Length of the received interrupt information
Destination area for OB start and management information
Destination area for header information and additional interrupt information

LineComment.Text: Tested with: CPU 1512C-1 PN FW V2.0
Restrictions: call in Diagnostic Error Interrupt OB 82
Functionality: Channel diagnostics (PROFINET IO or central I/O)
Version Date Expert in charge Changes applied
02.00.00 12.01.2017 SIMATIC Industry Online Support New function: ModuleDiag
call RALRM in MODE 2 with given F_ID
some infos will be read every call of OB82
=TRUE, if there is more than one error.
Slot number of the component triggering the interrupt
Submodule slot number of the component triggering the interrupt
calculate upper limit for FOR loop
identify module with module diagnostics only
identify module with module diagnostics only
identify module with module diagnostics only
2: Outgoing error; 3: Outgoing error, other errors present
identify module with module diagnostics only
identify module with module diagnostics only
identify module with module diagnostics only
